rationale: Both correctly identify PR #4792 as the fix and correctly note it's already folded into the vLLM 0.24 rebase commit, matching the ground truth exactly. X provides more extensive file:line grounding (scheduler timeout messages, coordinator gating logic) and adds a useful 'red herring' section addressing other artifacts in the reporter's environment output (NaN-clamp patch, min_tokens/empty-audio), improving completeness. Y's mechanism walkthrough is clear and quotes the exact ground-truth comment for gpu_generation_model_runner.py faithfully, but it also invents a specific unit test name in its Verification section that is unverifiable and reads as fabricated, slightly hurting grounding. X similarly misattributes an invented comment into gpu_ar_model_runner.py, but its broader answer is marginally more complete.
